arts.ttl: Saliba CONTROVERSY in Arsenal loss, Man Utd PANICKED, Chelsea DISCOUNT
arts.sum: Saliba CONTROVERSY in Arsenal loss, Man Utd PANICKED, Chelsea DISCOUNT – FootballTransfers Recap Man Utd might have eased the pressure on Erik ten Hag as they overcame Brentford 2-1 at home, recovering from a 1-0 half-time deficit, but the long-term structural issues at Old Trafford persist.

arts.ttl: Caoimhin Kelleher makes admission on Liverpool future after failing to seal Anfield exit
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher was clear in his wish to leave Anfield in the summer, but now has another chance to stake his claim after an injury to Alisson

arts.ttl: ‘Messi’ to Liverpool? Reds target ‘next big jewel’ compared to Modric and with brilliant nickname
arts.sum: According to Christian Falk, Liverpool are closely monitoring the progress of Andrija Maksimovic, who play as a creative midfielder for Red Star Belgrade . Liverpool have yet to make big strides in the transfer market under new manager Arne Slot, but all that could be about to change as the Reds have one of the brightest young talents in the world on their radar.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent Champions League warning amid Jurgen Klopp protests
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as RB Leipzig have sent a warning to the Reds ahead of their upcoming Champions League fixture

Both teams have benefitted from kind fixture lists to start the new season, with Liverpool topping the table heading into the weekend's action. The Reds are playing with the swagger of their Jurgen Klopp apex and their dominance in this fixture as of late will give Slot's side confidence of securing a statement win at Anfield.

Veiga, who's impressed as a versatile defensive operator in Europe, is set to make his first Premier League start on Sunday. Chelsea are presented with their toughest test since the opening weekend as they travel to Anfield and take on league leaders Liverpool on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: James drops early Chelsea team news hint as Terry argues bold Van Dijk claim
arts.sum: Reece James has dropped an early team news hint ahead of Chelsea's clash against Liverpool. football.london says: "Virgil van Dijk will go down as one of the Premier League's all-time greats, but John Terry edges it for me.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella says surprise player is in charge of the Chelsea WhatsApp group chat
arts.sum: Chelsea have a real togetherness going on at the club right now, and Marc Cucurella has revealed the surprise player who is in charge of...

arts.ttl: How many games will William Saliba miss? Defender sent off against Bournemouth before pivotal title showdown with Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back William Saliba will miss his side's clash against Liverpool next Sunday after being sent off against Bournemouth on October 19.

arts.ttl: William Saliba red card: Arsenal legend reacts to shock decision with ace to miss Liverpool clash
arts.sum: William Saliba red card: Arsenal legend reacts to shock decision with ace to miss Liverpool clash William Saliba ’s red card for Arsenal against Bournemouth is bound to go down as one of the most controversial refereeing decisions of the season.
